headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on Ventas, Raises Price Target to $96
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Steve Sakwa   maintains Ventas (NYSE:VTR) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $95 to $96.
